metadata.description: Agent skill for the peekie CLI — parse Xcode .xcresult bundles

plugins.name: peekie
plugins.description: Teaches the agent when and how to reach for the peekie CLI for Xcode .xcresult bundles. Ships as an umbrella skill plus one dedicated sub-skill per subcommand (peekie-tests, peekie-warnings, peekie-errors, peekie-coverage, peekie-attachments) — fully-qualified test names, attachment extraction, JSON output for jq pipelines, SonarQube reports
